name: remove_pin
short_description: Remove pins from the current design
full_help:
remove_pin

Description: 
Remove pins from the current design

Syntax: 
remove_pin  [-quiet] [-verbose] <pins>...

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution
  <pins>      List of pins to remove

Categories: 
Netlist

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
